seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Requested Vacation Time

Dear Team Member,

I am writing to formally confirm that your request for upcoming vacation days has been fully reviewed and approved by management. We understand the importance of taking time away to recharge and maintain a healthy work-life balance for everyone on our dedicated staff.

Your scheduled leave will begin on the specified date and end on the return date you have outlined in your initial application form. Please ensure that all your current projects are up to date before you depart so that your colleagues can cover any necessary tasks without interruption.

We appreciate your commitment to our team and look forward to welcoming you back refreshed and ready to contribute even more effectively. Please reply to this email with your updated calendar invitation if you have any changes to your travel plans.

3. "We appreciate your commitment to our team and look forward to welcoming you back refreshed and ready to contribute even more effectively. Please reply to this email with your updated calendar invitation if you have any changes to your travel plans."
